repo_note: Canonical shared parameters for Wave A unified methods (Phase 1). Native prop names differ; adapters map these.

int_field.notes: Tk uses tkinter_Spinbox with string text for current value; range via to + increment.

float_field.notes: Tk float uses tkinter_Spinbox; format optional.

combo_box.notes: Tk selection uses first value string; DPG value is selected item string.

slider.notes: DPG uses DpgSliderInt. Tk ttk.Scale uses from_/to + value.

progress.notes: Unified value is 0.0..1.0; Qt/Tk map to 0..maximum (default 100).

tab_stack.notes: Empty props baseline; children mount via PyRolyze tree. DPG uses DpgTabBar (subset).

radio_button.notes: DPG radio uses items tuple + value string; single option uses items=(text,).
